item.title: The book you would read over and over again
item.description: Mine is Jim Butcher's Codex Alera series. It is just soul comfort. The audiobook version is also so very enjoyable. What's yours? Edit: Oop, this one blew up ^^ Thank you all for your lovely comments (/recommendations)!

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Assholes can park after all…
item.description:
So; a while ago I found this council sticker in it’s bag, blown on the wind. Car authorised for removal sticker. I’ll be honest… I kept it because I thought I would prank a friend…
Several days later I find this asshole parking across two spots, and not for the first time (distinct car). It seemed the perfect opportunity? For the record, I was late for a meeting. Trying to find parking the previous time so I already had a petty vendetta.
I’m not sure this counts as ‘impersonating a police officer’ but I did fill out his car details with a fake ‘authorised for removal’ sticker for ‘Parking’. Did I do wrong? Obviously - *obviously* there is no chance how car would be touched, from the top floor of a car park; nobody else knew about it..?!
But I did feel quite happy leaving them this gift.
And who should I find in the same space today? But look how well they have parked now ?
Look at that consideration? Space for another car next to them? Isn’t that kind. So. I plead my guilt to the Imgur jury, and ask… was I right or was I wrong? Judge me!
item.dc:creator: GiddyKipper

item.title: screaming into the void? yelling for help?
item.description: Throw away account. Half screaming into the void, half asking for help. I am a MA resident, and as the meme says, I'm voting for the first time in my life. I have questions about my mail-in ballot that I can't find satisfactory answers to on google, and I am the only one in my family who isn't a MAGAt. If there are any fellow blue MA residents out there, I'd really appreciate a dm so I can throw a few questions at you. I do not want this to get to the FP, I don't care about points, I'm just looking for a nudge in the right direction.

that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Meme Dump 13 out of 200
item.description:
And it's another day of cleaning out my 11k meme folder from my phone. Here we go on the shenanigan adventure from 2017 to current
Can never unsee white Jay Z
Where I live its like this for months - I hate iiiiiit
And being a tall... this was the worst
Saw somewhere that you should start saying bless you at the same volume that they sneeze at
Say it like Shrek
Thanks for joining me ~ hope your Monday has been calm, and if it hasn't - treat yourself to something tastey ! See you tomorrow ♡

item.dc:creator: kmcshane

item.title: Some companies are just shit
item.description: She's in Florida, company is in Texas. Suing their asses for ADA discrimination is probably impractical and would cost her more emotional labor at this point than it would be worth, even if she could find an attorney who would work on contingency. She'll apply for unemployment and keep on looking for something better, but fuck companies like this. In the ass. With a sharp, dry cactus. MV Edit: Grateful for the support and advice. Will, as the legal eagles say, "take it under advisement" and discuss the matter with our daughter. Please vote Blue forever, everywhere; in the long run, this will strengthen workers' rights and unionization which exists to counter this kind of corporate bullshit. To those saying she was just a bad employee and the two things are not related, the chain of events is undisputed. All was syncopetic¹ until she told her supervisor that she had occasional seizures. She was immediately locked out of system access and told to wait for a company decision. It came this morning, and she was instructed to return her company computer at once. Up until then, things had been going well. ¹ Shit. "Copacetic." I *knew* that looked wrong, but I just couldn't dredge up the right word. *weeps in 72*

item.title: Images of Note: That is a butthole
item.description:
I need to message people this when I do not want to go out.
Who did that? WHO DID THAT TO THEM! I WILL REMOVE YOUR FUCKING SPINAL FLUID!
S H A R K !
Christopher Robin killed God then married his cousin.
Huskies are smort
chaos!
"You should have kids you do not want to have!" "But I do not want to have kids!" "That's Selfish!" "Surely having kids I do not want to have would be unfair on the kids because I never wanted to have them in the first place? Surely by demanding I have kids I do not want to have, you are being selfish?" "Don't care, I just want to enforce social norms by forcing people to have kids they never wanted to have in the first place out of blind social obligation."
I said this about the whole JoCat fiasco: It is not enough for transphobes and homophobes for you to be cis, you must be cis and straight in a way they approve of.
This is a butthole.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Wednesday meme dump
item.description:
1. I can see how that can be intimidating....
2
3. NOT TODAY
4
5. Guy want's to break free
6
7
8. Bro lifted so much, he moved his spirit
9. What were you expecting to happen?!
10
11
12
13. There's a neat way to test that hypothesis ;)
14. I'm sorry but you have been scrolling for too long and I now have to charge you a puppy tax
15. And finally I would like to share something awesome from myself. I've been working very hard (in the past year or so months) on "Stanley Parable"-like game with a touch of GladOS from "Portal". If you happen to be a gaming fan, please wishlist. The demo was part of Steam Next Fest and got some really postivereaction : ) A guy on Discord said it is good, and my mom said you should try it, best thing she played since Super Mario (and only thing) https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.dc:creator: BenDoverTeeHeeHee

item.title: Just screaming into the morning
item.description: I'm going to work right now to resign from my toxic ass job, and I'm scared. I *think* I have a job on the bag but I'm not certain. All I know is that the day after I got into a car accident last week, my boss sent a text that said "you're out of pto time and there's some questions only you can answer about some bracing" That was the final straw. So this morning, I'm going to work, sitting in the admin lobby, compiling an email to the CEO, meeting with HR, resigning, collecting my things, and leaving for good. When you WAKE UP with a wet face and tears streaming down it, it's time to free yourself from that toxicity, right? Wish me luck, imgur. I'm about to be jobless (again). EDIT: MV for this purple sweet potato?! Lol don't judge my messy stovetop, please! Thanks, imgur! I feel SOOOO much better and lighter! ? Any imgurians near Orlando (or east!) who wanna link up, DM me! I *always* need a Universal buddy! I'm gonna celebrate today by getting higher than giraffe titties and watching some stand up comedians. Any suggestions?!
item.dc:creator: MadamPuddifoot

item.dc:creator: rhinokitty

item.title: The kinksmith followup post. I hate you guys.
item.description:
Apparently you fuckers love to traumatize FP and don't listen to pleas of "please just let this die in usersub"
So I have two designs that may work, the first is a spatula. Nothing complicated, just a thin steel sheet with a handle. Easy to make and easy to use. Just cut them out of a sheet and put on a nice handle.
Ok, I'm going to take a steel reinforcement bar and forge weld two pieces of thinner steel to either side to make an oblong whacker about 8 inches long with a () profile. I want something with the weight of a large paddle (2ish lbs) but with an easily carried profile, that way users can fit it in a purse or bag, and use it for both dungeon and covert public fun. Here's the thing. I can't sell this to regular people who want to get into kink after watching Christian grey lightly tap Mrs Steel with a paddle from Adam and Eve. No. This thing could break bones if used wrong. The last thing I need is a lawsuit. So I'm probably going to keep a bunch of unfinished ones around and customize them for customers with wooden handles, inscriptions, rivets for force concentration, holes, and other things.
And I have a name! The Filthy Fish Foundry! If you follow me, you'll recognize the reason, otherwise I'll keep it a secret. And finally, my shopping list. I need a fullering block to make the rivets/studs, polishing wheels for my trusty grinder, some Hardy tools for my hardy hole (that's what it's called, get your mind out of the gutter) a laser engraver, steel, and a few other odds and ends to make things perfect.
Have a sleepy snek to clear your mind. Her name is Andromeda. Also, I included jen e' sae qua in my last post, and a few of you corrected me. But I didn't change it because watching the francophone hive mind lose their collective shits in the comments helped ease the pain. Thank you! Edit 1: I just got gifted imgur emerald and I pray to God that it's some sort of algorithm thing for power posters.... Edit 2: I'm probably going to be setting up a website for this since I've had about 25 people express interest in this. Let me know if you have HTML coding experience and want a free paddle and other test gear from my fucked up kitchen. I'd love to have some /slave labor/ for this project. Most viral: god fucking damnit, again???
item.dc:creator: NotaScientologist

item.title: Top science news of the week - Feb 05-11 2024
item.description: Sauce (Source) 1. Category 6 Hurricanes https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/02/240205164816.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2308901121 2. Black holes before galaxies https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/02/240206144917.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.3847/2041-8213/ad1bf0 3. Blueberries https://www.sciencenews.org/article/blueberry-blue-color-nanostructure-wax-pigment Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/sciadv.adk4219 4. Fern with root-leaves https://www.sciencenews.org/article/fern-first-plant-dead-leaves-new-roots Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://esajournals.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1002/ecy.4248 5. Spiraly lenses https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2024/02/240208122046.htm Sauce of the sauce (the actual research article from where the news came from) https://opg.optica.org/optica/fulltext.cfm?uri=optica-11-2-238
item.dc:creator: Sheldonian
